---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new protocol or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is this a new protocol or an improvement to an existing one?**
New protocol / Improvement to `/command-name`

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the workflow gap or pain point.

**Proposed solution**
How should the protocol work? Include example input/output if possible.

**Discipline**
Which discipline does this belong to? (See CONTRIBUTING.md for the list)

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you've thought about.
